name: video-report-agent-local
description: Local Codex workflow for preparing video evidence and writing Chinese video reports.

interface.shortDescription: Turn video links or local files into Chinese quick/deep image-text reports.
interface.longDescription: A local-only Codex plugin wrapper around the video-bundle-agent Python CLI. It provides two skills: video-bundle-prep for collecting and preparing evidence bundles, and video-report for writing quick or deep Chinese HTML/PNG reports from that evidence. The user-facing plugin name is Video Report Agent to match the final report workflow.
defaultPrompt: 用这个视频链接生成中文 quick 报告
用 deep 模式分析这个视频
把这个本地视频生成图文报告
